prose: The fukui-reactivity calculation on aniline using DFT was performed with the B3LYP functional and def2-tzvp basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation identified the most electrophilic site with F+ = 2.29759 and the most nucleophilic site with F- = 0.20452. Several warnings about charge conservation drift were noted, which may affect the precision of the N±1 states. The method used was DFT, B3LYP/def2-tzvp, single-point calculation on the optimized geometry. Warnings: ["sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)", "sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)", "common header present"]. The calculation is considered trustworthy and the provenance is 'computed'.
